CAMPAIGN CONTEXT: Shardsea of Governance is civilization's nervous system — whoever controls these waters controls trade, communication, and military projection across the known world. Unlike the elemental rawness of Shard A or the spiritual corruption of Shard B, danger here is structural: competing naval authorities, merchant factions, and political brokers all operating with their own agendas. The leyline corruption vision connects to whatever is wrong here — corruption at the institutional level may mirror or be caused by the same metaphysical rot the party has been chasing. Vargr's spirit-speaking is relevant; old power in this region has witnesses. The party enters with no reputation, no contacts, and no charts — first moves this session establish everything.
